claims.summary: Slow texture reorganization should remain visible as a transition candidate even when fill delta is small.
claims.disposition: verify stable-fill, high-entropy, texture-anchor, vector, and density-gradient transition review tests

claims.summary: Joint transitions need shared room, correspondence, ownership, witness, reply, persistence, and replay fields.

claims.summary: Automatically changing mode, MomentCapture, vectors, pressure, or control from a transition card would alter live behavior.
